name: Dr. Pepper Cherry Marshmallow Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Dark sweet cherries, pitted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange cherries evenly on bottom of a greased 9 x 13 pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. In a small saucepan, combine the reserved cherry syrup, 1 package of Cherry Jello, and 1/4 cup Dr. Pepper. Gently heat until jello is dissolved. Add almond extract and cool slightly.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine yellow cake mix, 1 package of Cherry Jello, oil, eggs, and 3/4 cup Dr. Pepper. Beat on high for 3-4 minutes.
5. Pour the cooled jello mixture over cherries in pan.
6. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the jello.
7. Carefully spoon the batter mix evenly over the marshmallows.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes.
9. Cool on rack for 45 minutes.
10. Chill 3-4 hours. This is a self-icing cake!
